items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery status tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Delivery status tracking' feature, but the evidence provided does not include any API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for delivery status tracking, there is no concrete evidence confirming its implementation or how it can be validated through API reads or persisted state checks. Therefore, the evidence does not confirm requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
